summary: Security Dashboard UI testing complete. All features working correctly - page loads at /security-dashboard, shows CPU/Memory/Disk metrics, has 4 functional tabs (Overview, Antivirus, Integrity, History), Quick Actions work, Start/Stop Protection works, security scan and integrity verification work.

minor.issue: Statistics calculation counts 'skipped' fixes as 'failed'. The get_fix_statistics() function calculates failed = total - successful - partial, which means skipped results are incorrectly counted as failed.
Security scan detects autonomous_healer.py as suspicious (false positive) because it contains malware detection regex patterns with 'eval' and 'base64' strings

features_tested.details: Page loads correctly via nav-security-dashboard button in sidebar

features_tested.feature: Overview tab shows CPU, Memory, Disk metrics
features_tested.details: All 4 metric cards display correctly with real-time data (CPU 19.2%, Memory 57.2%, Disk 43.7%, Success Rate 66.7%)

features_tested.feature: Quick Actions buttons for each fix type
features_tested.details: 8 fix type buttons present: Database Connection, Memory Cleanup, Network Issues, Dependencies, Permissions, Frontend, Async Errors, Thread Issues

features_tested.feature: Antivirus scan tab with Run Full Scan button
features_tested.details: Antivirus tab accessible, Run Full Scan button works, shows scan results (246 files scanned, system clean)

features_tested.feature: Integrity tab with Verify Integrity button
features_tested.details: Integrity tab shows Verify Integrity button, correctly shows 'All Files Intact' after checking 4 critical files
History tab displays fix history items with error_type, details, execution_time_ms, and timestamp
Start Protection button activates healer (shows 'Protection Active' badge), Stop button deactivates it

features_tested.feature: Fix statistics display (total, successful, partial, failed)
features_tested.details: Fix Statistics section shows counts after fixes are applied (Total: 3, Successful: 2, Partial: 0, Failed: 1)

features_tested.feature: Security scan results display threats and suspicious files
features_tested.details: Scan results show files_scanned count, threats_found list, suspicious_files list with file names and reasons

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: The get_fix_statistics() function in autonomous_healer.py calculates failed = total - successful - partial, which means 'skipped' results are counted as 'failed'. Consider adding a separate 'skipped' count for accurate statistics.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security Dashboard fully tested and working. The dashboard at /security-dashboard has 4 tabs: Overview (system metrics), Antivirus (malware scanning), Integrity (file verification), History (fix records). All autonomous-healer API endpoints working: /status, /health, /scan, /integrity, /start, /stop, /fix. Quick Actions allow manual triggering of 8 fix types. Minor known issue: skipped fixes counted as failed in statistics.
